theme: Make idle moments speak — the office should never feel abandoned
visual_observations: Desktop (1280x800): Luna is clocked in at top-left desk with color-block monitor. All other desks show ghost state with faint standby pulse. Coffee corner top-right with TRIPLE SHOT steam. Whiteboard left with vibe doodle. Cactus blooming. Window shows amber gradient. Conference table bottom-center with 'everyone is at their desk' label. Vacant desk bottom-right with job-card hover. Mobile (375x812): Renders cleanly but shortcut toast leaks outside office card boundary. Vibe: after-hours, indigo border glow with starfield floor. Review #54 ideas (solo mode, tab title whisper, doodle variants, stats dispatch, idle thought bubbles, coffee topics, sparkline stability, Bloberto vibe badge) are NOT yet implemented.

ideas.title: Tab Title Whispers When Hidden
ideas.description: From review #54 — still not implemented. When document.visibilityState becomes 'hidden', change tab title contextually: if there's an error worker show '⚠️ Someone needs help — Bloberto Office'; if a worker completes while hidden show '✅ Task shipped! — Bloberto Office'; if idle show '💤 Office is quiet — Bloberto Office'. Reset to normal cycling on visible. The tab title is the ONLY way to reach users in another tab. This is free engagement.

ideas.title: Stats Bar Dispatch Lines
ideas.description: From review #54 — still not implemented. Below each stat number, add a one-line editorial comment keyed to the value. Active: {0: 'ghost town', 1: 'lone wolf', 2: 'dynamic duo', 3: 'skeleton crew'}. Error: {0: 'smooth sailing', 1: 'minor turbulence', 2: 'code red'}. Idle: {0: 'all hands on deck', 1: 'one on break', 2: 'half the team wandering'}. Render as span.stat-dispatch, 0.7rem muted italic with min-height to prevent layout shift. WHY: Numbers alone are data. Numbers with personality are a story. This turns the stats bar from a dashboard into a narrator.

ideas.title: Whiteboard Doodle Rotation
ideas.description: From review #54 — still not implemented. The whiteboard has one ASCII doodle per vibe that never changes. Add DOODLE_VARIANTS with 3-4 options per vibe state and rotate every 4 minutes via useEffect interval. Vibe change resets to index 0. Example: crushing cycles through (◕‿◕), (ᵔᴥᵔ), \o/; on-fire cycles through (╯°□°)╯, ಠ_ಠ, (ノಠ益ಠ)ノ. WHY: The whiteboard doodle is a secret joy. When it changes without notification — just a different face watching the progress bar — that's micro-discovery that keeps people watching.

ideas.title: Vibe Sparkline Stability Badge
ideas.description: From review #54 — still not implemented. The VibeSparkline shows colored dots but no synthesis. Add: (1) a tiny 'vibe history' label below the SVG. (2) A stability tag: if last 5 vibes are identical → green 'stable' pill; if 3+ different keys in last 5 → amber 'volatile' pill. Render below sparkline in .stat-card.vibe. WHY: The sparkline is decorative data nobody interprets. One word — 'stable' or 'volatile' — turns it into insight.

ideas.title: Office Floor Night Mode Ambient Sound Toggle
ideas.description: New idea. Add a tiny speaker icon button in the office-sign area (top-left corner). When toggled on, play a subtle ambient loop: keyboard clicks during working state, quiet hum during idle, rain during slow-day. Use Web Audio API with very low gain (0.05-0.1). Store preference in localStorage. Default OFF. WHY: The office is visually alive but sonically dead. Even a faint ambient layer would make people feel like they're watching a real space. The toggle keeps it opt-in so it never annoys.

ideas.title: Bloberto Manager Vibe Badge
ideas.description: From review #54 — still not implemented. Add a tiny floating emoji badge above Bloberto's avatar that reacts to team vibe: crushing → 🚀, on-fire → 😬, in-flow → 😌, slow-day → 🫠, after-hours → ☕. Implemented as span.mgr-vibe-badge positioned absolute top-right of avatar circle, swaps with 0.3s scale bounce keyed to vibeKey. WHY: Bloberto is the mascot. He should have feelings about his team's performance.

ideas.title: Coffee Corner Overheard Topics
ideas.description: From review #54 — still not implemented. When 2+ idle workers gather at coffee corner (chatting state), pick a random topic from CHAT_TOPICS: ['the deploy timing', 'that one PR', 'sprint velocity again', 'who touched the schema', 'the on-call rotation']. Show as tiny italic text below 'chatting' label. WHY: The chatting state says workers gathered but not about what. 'who touched the schema' as you scroll past is comedy that makes the app feel like an actual office.

ideas.title: Activity Log Gets a Daily Digest Mode
ideas.description: New idea. Add a 'digest' filter/view to the activity log that collapses the day's entries into a narrative paragraph: 'Today: Luna reviewed the office twice, Carlos shipped 3 features, Sofia found 4 bugs. The team was mostly in-flow with one on-fire moment around 3pm. Vibe trend: stable.' Generated client-side from the activity entries using template strings keyed to event types and counts. Toggle between timeline and digest view. WHY: The activity log grows long. A digest turns raw events into a story someone could read in 10 seconds and understand the whole day.
